prompt: A Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting a lone traveller descending a steep mountain path through layered valleys. The traveller takes small careful steps always moving downhill, never up. The mountain has many ridges and false valleys. Flat unmodulated areas of colour — indigo, ochre, pine green. Bold outlines, visible woodgrain texture, stark figure-ground contrast, Hokusai compositional diagonals. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no equations.
tradition_approach: Hokusai compositional diagonals, flat unmodulated colour areas in indigo and ochre, bold outlines, visible woodgrain texture, stark figure-ground contrast typical of ukiyo-e landscape prints.
